message:
test(frankensqlite): add structured logging tracing field assertions (30 tests)

Verifies migration M0-M5 stages emit required tracing fields
(migration_stage, event_count, digest, etc.), rollback classifier
logs stage/class/triggers at correct levels, and bootstrap logs
backend/data_path. Includes LogCapture tracing layer infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
